description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Hire the cheapest 2-ton electric chain hoist for 3 days next week with depot pickup
tasks.description: Find an electric chain hoist with at least 2-ton capacity, filter for next week’s 3-day hire, sort by daily rate, select the cheapest option, and place it in the cart with depot pickup selected. Success = cart contains exactly 1 electric chain hoist with capacity ≥ 2 tons, a 3-day hire set for next week, and delivery method set to depot pickup.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage by clicking the site logo or entering the homepage URL.
Click the "Equipment Hire" option in the main navigation and select "Electric Chain Hoists" from the dropdown menu.
In the sidebar capacity filter, select all options that are "2 ton" and higher (for example, select checkboxes for "2 ton", "3 ton", and "5 ton").
In the sidebar power source filter, select the "Electric" option.
Use the hire dates selector above the product list to set the start date to next Monday and the end date to next Wednesday (3 consecutive days).
Open the sort dropdown above the product grid and choose the option labeled "Daily Rate: Low to High".
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list to open its product detail page.
On the product page, enter "3" into any hire duration field if it is separate from the date selector.
Click the "Add to Cart" button on the product page.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page and select "Depot Pickup" as the delivery or collection method.

tasks.name: Hire two 1-ton manual chain hoists for the weekend under $60/day with high ratings
tasks.description: Locate 1-ton manual chain hoists with a daily rate under $60 and a rating of at least 4 stars, select a weekend hire period (Saturday–Sunday), and add 2 units of the first matching product to the cart with standard delivery. Success = cart contains quantity 2 of a 1-ton manual chain hoist with rating ≥ 4 stars, daily rate ≤ $60, for a Saturday–Sunday hire, with standard delivery selected.
steps: From any page, click the site logo to navigate to the homepage.
Click the "Equipment Hire" menu and select the "Manual Chain Hoists" category.
In the capacity filter section, select the option labeled "1 ton".
In the price filter area, enter "$60" as the maximum daily rate and apply the filter.
In the ratings filter, select the option for "4 stars & up" (or the closest available high-rating option such as "4.5+ stars").
Use the hire dates picker near the top of the page to set the start date to the upcoming Saturday and the end date to the upcoming Sunday.
In the filtered product list, click the first product that shows a 1-ton capacity and a star rating of 4 or more to open its detail page.
On the product detail page, set the quantity field to "2" units.
Click the "Add to Cart" button, then click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page and choose the "Standard Delivery" shipping option.

tasks.name: Create a hire quote for a 1-ton manual chain hoist and a compatible 2-ton beam trolley for 5 days
tasks.description: Add one 1-ton manual chain hoist and one beam trolley rated for 2 tons to a quote, set the same 5-day hire period and site postcode, and submit the quote request. Success = a quote request is submitted containing exactly two items (1-ton manual chain hoist and 2-ton beam trolley) with identical 5-day hire dates and postcode 10001.
steps: Go to the website homepage by clicking the site logo or entering the homepage URL.
Click "Equipment Hire" in the main navigation and select the "Manual Chain Hoists" category.
In the capacity filter, select "1 ton" to show only 1-ton manual chain hoists.
Click on the second product in the filtered results list to open its product detail page.
On the product detail page, click the "Add to Quote" button instead of adding it to the cart.
Use the navigation menu or breadcrumb to return to "Equipment Hire" and then select the "Beam Trolleys" category.
In the beam trolley filters, open the "Hoist Capacity" or compatibility filter and select "2 ton".
Click on the first product in the filtered beam trolley results and click its "Add to Quote" button.
Click the "Quote Basket" or "View Quote" link/icon in the header to open the quote summary page.

On the quote page, set the same hire start date and end date for both items so that the total period is 5 consecutive days, enter "10001" into the site postcode field, and click the "Submit Quote Request" button.

tasks.name: Save the lightest 3-ton electric hoist under $150/day to a favourites list using product comparison
tasks.description: Filter for 3-ton electric hoists under $150/day, compare three options, find the lightest one, and save it to a wishlist/favourites list. Success = favourites/wishlist contains at least one 3-ton electric hoist under $150/day that was chosen as the lowest-weight option from a 3-product comparison.
steps: Navigate to the homepage using the site logo or URL.
Click "Equipment Hire" and choose the "Electric Chain Hoists" category.
Apply the capacity filter to show only "3 ton" hoists.
Set the maximum daily rate filter to "$150" and apply it.
In the product list, use the comparison controls to select the first three visible products (for example, click each product's "Compare" checkbox or icon).
Click the "Compare Selected" button to open the comparison page for the three selected hoists.
On the comparison table, identify which hoist has the smallest numerical value in the "Weight" row and click that hoist’s product name or "View Details" link.
On the selected product’s detail page, click the "Save to Wishlist" or "Add to Favourites" button.
Use the header menu to navigate to "My Wishlist" or "Saved Items" to open the page showing the list of saved products.

tasks.name: Select a scaffold hoist with at least 20 m lift height for a weekend hire and proceed to guest checkout with address entered
tasks.description: Find a scaffold hoist with lift height ≥ 20 m, set a weekend-inclusive 3-day hire, add it to the cart, then proceed through guest checkout to the point where contact and address details are entered. Success = checkout flow reached where contact name, email, and full address are filled for a scaffold hoist of ≥ 20 m lift height with a Saturday–Monday 3-day hire.
steps: From the homepage, click "Equipment Hire" and select the "Scaffold Hoists" category.
In the lift height filter section, set the minimum lift height to "20 m".
Use the hire dates selector to set the start date to the upcoming Saturday and the end date to the upcoming Monday (3 days including the weekend).
Open the sort dropdown above the product listing and choose "Lift Height: High to Low".
Click the first product in the sorted results list to open its product detail page.
On the product page, enter "3" into any hire duration field if it exists and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Click the cart icon in the header, then click the "Proceed to Checkout" button on the cart page.
On the checkout page, select the "Checkout as Guest" option if it appears.
In the contact information section, enter the name "Alex Smith" and the email address "alex.smith@example.com".
In the address section, enter street address "123 Industrial Road", city "Riverton", and postcode "75001" into the respective fields.

tasks.name: Register an account and save an electric hoist safety guide to saved resources
tasks.description: Create a new on-site user account, navigate to the safety guides, search for an electric hoist safety article, and save it to the user’s saved resources list. Success = a logged-in account exists and the saved resources section contains at least one article related to electric hoist safety.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Sign Up" or "Register" link in the header area.
On the registration form, enter the name "Jordan Lee", the email "jordan.lee@example.com", and the password "TestPass123!" into the appropriate fields.
Select "Contractor" (or a similar role) from any available user type dropdown and click the "Create Account" or equivalent registration button.
After registration, click the site logo to return to the homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over or click "Resources" and select "Safety Guides" from the dropdown menu.
In the resources search field, type "electric hoist safety" and submit the search query.
Click on the first article whose title includes the words "Electric Hoist Safety" to open the article page.
On the article page, click the "Save Guide" or "Add to My Resources" button.
Use the header menu to navigate to "My Account" and then click "Saved Resources" to open the list of saved articles.

tasks.name: Compare three 1.5-ton lever hoists and hire the one with the longest chain length under $75/day
tasks.description: Filter for 1.5-ton lever hoists under $75/day, compare three products, pick the one with the longest standard chain length, and add it to the cart for a 3-day hire starting on the first day of next month. Success = cart contains exactly one 1.5-ton lever hoist with daily rate ≤ $75 and the longest chain length among the three compared items, with a 3-day hire starting on the first day of the next month.
steps: Navigate to the homepage using the site logo or URL.
Click "Equipment Hire" and select the "Lever Hoists" category.
Set the capacity filter to "1.5 ton" so that only 1.5-ton lever hoists are shown.
Set the maximum daily rate filter to "$75" and apply it.
In the filtered product list, use the comparison controls to select the first three visible products (for example, click each product’s "Compare" checkbox or icon).
Click the "Compare Selected" button to open the comparison page for the three lever hoists.
On the comparison page, identify the hoist with the highest numerical value in the "Standard Chain Length" row and click its product name or "View Details" link.
On the selected product’s detail page, use the date selector to set the hire start date to the first day of next month and the end date to three days after that date.
Click the "Add to Cart" button on the product page.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page.

tasks.name: Hire an outdoor-rated electric hoist with IP65 or higher for 10 days with delivery to postcode 30301
tasks.description: Filter for outdoor-rated electric hoists with IP rating ≥ IP65, choose a model, set a 10-day hire starting two weeks from today, add it to the cart, and proceed in checkout with site delivery to postcode 30301 and a note about rooftop installation. Success = checkout flow reached where cart contains one outdoor-rated electric hoist with IP rating ≥ IP65, 10-day hire set, delivery method set to site delivery, postcode 30301 entered, and a rooftop installation note added.
steps: From the homepage, click "Equipment Hire" and select the "Electric Chain Hoists" or "Electric Hoists" category.
In the filters section, open the "Environment" or "Usage" filter and select the option for "Outdoor" or "Outdoor Rated".
In the "IP Rating" filter, select IP65 and all higher-rated options (such as IP66 and IP67).
Use the hire date range selector to choose a start date that is exactly two weeks from today and an end date that is 10 days after that start date.
Open the sort dropdown above the product list and select an option like "Availability: In Stock First" if it is available.
Click the first product in the filtered results list to open its detail page.
On the product page, enter "10" into any hire duration field if it is separate from the date picker and click the "Add to Cart" button.
Click the cart icon in the header and then click the "Proceed to Checkout" button.
On the checkout page, select the "Site Delivery" delivery method and enter the postcode "30301" into the postcode field.
In the delivery notes or special instructions field, type "Outdoor rooftop installation" and click the "Continue" or equivalent button to move to the next step in the checkout process.
